name: 禁忌情感懸念
description: 男主以強勢佔有欲姿態逼近女主，台詞充滿控制與獵捕意味，營造危險吸引力——觀眾既擔心女主安全又好奇兩人關係走向。

examples.drama_title: 申浩男&朱丽岚 | 她是秦家灭门案幸存者，化名寻凶复仇时，遇上深不可测的他。二人在试探中相互吸引[MULTI SUB | FULL]#MiniDrama #精彩大陆短剧
examples.excerpt: From the first time you saw me you should have understood that what I want I must get / You're like a fish in this fish tank / No matter how you swim you can't escape my sight / If you don't listen I'll lock you up like a chain / The harder you struggle the tighter I'll lock you
